004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the
006 * "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the
007 * License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
019
020import java.util.*;
021import java.util.function.*;
022
023/**
024 * Base for boolean headers.
025 *
026 * @since 9.2.1
027 */
028@SuppressWarnings({
029   "java:S2160", // equals() on HttpHeaderBean uses name + getValue(); typed state is reflected in getValue()
030   "unchecked" // Supplier<?> branches cast to typed suppliers after lazy-mode check
031})
032public class HttpBooleanHeader extends HttpHeaderBean {
033
034   public static final int LAZY_WIRE_STRING = 0;
035   public static final int LAZY_BOOLEAN = 1;
036
037   private final Boolean value;
038   private final Supplier<?> lazySupplier;
039   private final int lazyMode;
040
041   /**
042    * Creates an {@link HttpBooleanHeader} by parsing the given wire-format value.
043    *
044    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
045    * @param wireValue Wire value (e.g. {@code "true"}). May be {@code null}.
046    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
047    */
048   public static HttpBooleanHeader of(String name, String wireValue) {
049      return new HttpBooleanHeader(name, wireValue);
050   }
051
052   /**
053    * Creates an {@link HttpBooleanHeader} with the given typed value.
054    *
055    * @param name Header name. Must not be {@code null}.
056    * @param typedValue The boolean value. May be {@code null}.
057    * @return A new instance. Never {@code null}.
058    */
059   public static HttpBooleanHeader of(String name, Boolean typedValue) {
060      return new HttpBooleanHeader(name, typedValue);
061   }
062
063   protected HttpBooleanHeader(String name, String wireValue) {
064      super(name, wireValue);
065      this.value = ie(wireValue) ? null : Boolean.valueOf(b(wireValue));
066      this.lazySupplier = null;
067      this.lazyMode = -1;
068   }
069
070   protected HttpBooleanHeader(String name, Boolean typedValue) {
071      super(name, s(typedValue));
072      this.value = typedValue;
073      this.lazySupplier = null;
074      this.lazyMode = -1;
075   }
076
077   protected HttpBooleanHeader(String name, Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
078      super(name, lazyMode == LAZY_WIRE_STRING
079         ? ((Supplier<String>) supplier)::get
080         : () -> s(((Supplier<Boolean>) supplier).get()));
081      this.value = null;
082      this.lazySupplier = supplier;
083      this.lazyMode = lazyMode;
084   }
085
086   public Optional<Boolean> asBoolean() {
087      return o(toBoolean());
088   }
089
090   @Override
091   public String getValue() {
092      return s(toBoolean());
093   }
094
095   public boolean isTrue() {
096      return Boolean.TRUE.equals(toBoolean());
097   }
098
099   public Boolean orElse(Boolean other) {
100      var x = toBoolean();
101      return nn(x) ? x : other;
102   }
103
104   public Boolean toBoolean() {
105      if (lazyMode == LAZY_BOOLEAN)
106         return ((Supplier<Boolean>) lazySupplier).get();
107      if (value != null)
108         return value;
109      var v = super.getValue();
110      return ie(v) ? null : Boolean.valueOf(b(v));
111   }
112}
